zh.lifeSummary: 當Richard Starkey於1170年出生在英國英格蘭爾斯特頓時，他的父親Richard De Starkey20歲，母親Philippa Greseley18歲。他和Mrs Richard Starky至少有1個兒子。他去世於1201年在阿曼h拉爾享年31歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Richard Starkey于1170年出生在英国英格兰爾斯特頓时，他的父亲Richard De Starkey20岁，母亲Philippa Greseley18岁。他和Mrs Richard Starky至少有1个儿子。他去世于1201年在阿曼h拉爾享年31岁。

nameMeanings.name: Starkey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost or unidentified place, probably in Lancashire. This English surname has been established in Ireland (Dublin) since the 14th century.

English: variant of Starkin, itself perhaps from an unrecorded Old French personal name Starkin, a pet form of ancient Germanic names beginning in Stark- ‘strong’, such as Starc(w)ulf and Starcher, both of which appear in 1086 as names of Domesday Book tenants in East Anglia: Starcolf (Norfolk) and Starker (Suffolk). However, no medieval evidence for Starkin as a personal name or a surname has been found. An alternative possibility is a derivation from an unrecorded Middle English starking ‘strong one’ (see Stark ), but in the absence of any medieval evidence this is highly conjectural.
Altered form of German   Starke  , written thus to preserve the second syllable.

variants.name: Starkes
meanings: probably a variant of Starkey , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Sturkey
meanings: English: possibly a variant of   Starkey  .

variants.name: Stark
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire) and English: nickname from Middle English stark ‘strong, sturdy; harsh, severe’ (Old English stearc).
German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): nickname for a strong, bold person, from Middle High German stark(e), German stark ‘strong, brave’.
Czech and Slovak (Štark): of German origin (see 2 above).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Richard Starkey was born in 1170, in Stretton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Richard De Starkey, was 20 and his mother, Philippa Greseley, was 18. He had at least 1 son with Mrs Richard Starky. He died in 1201, in Ḩall, Oman, at the age of 31.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Richard Starkey est né en 1170, à Stretton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Richard De Starkey, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Philippa Greseley, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Mrs Richard Starky. Il est décédé en 1201, à Ḩall, Oman, à l’âge de 31 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Richard Starkey 1170 in Stretton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard De Starkey 20 und seine Mutter Philippa Greseley 18. Er hatte mit Mrs Richard Starky mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1201 im Alter von 31 Jahren in Ḩall, Oman.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Richard Starkey è nato il nel 1170 nel Stretton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Richard De Starkey, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Greseley, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Mrs Richard Starky. Morì nel 1201, nel Ḩall, Oman, all'età di 31 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Richard Starkeyが1170年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアストレットオンで生まれた時，父Richard De Starkeyは20歳，母Philippa Greseleyは18歳であった。彼はMrs Richard Starkyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1201年にオマーンhアルで31歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Richard Starkey(이)가 1170년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 스트레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard De Starkey(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Greseley(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Mrs Richard Starky(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1201년 오만 h알에서 31세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Richard Starkey родился в 1170 г. в местности стреттон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Richard De Starkey было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Greseley, 18. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Mrs Richard Starky. Он умер в 1201 г. в местности hалл, Оман в возрасте 31 год.
